properties.title: Forest Entity Type
properties.description: The ecosystem entity type for which the phenology metric is derived. Values may identify forest entities such as coniferous or deciduous forest.

properties.title: Observation Year
properties.description: Calendar year associated with the phenology observation or derived annual EBV metric.

properties.title: Start of VAP (Day of Year)
properties.description: Integer day of year marking the start of the Vegetation Active Period.

properties.title: Mean DOY (spatial average)
properties.description: Spatial mean day-of-year value calculated across valid grid cells or pixels for the selected feature.

properties.title: Minimum DOY
properties.description: Minimum day-of-year value observed across the valid spatial cells for the selected feature.

properties.title: Maximum DOY
properties.description: Maximum day-of-year value observed across the valid spatial cells for the selected feature.

properties.title: Standard Deviation of DOY
properties.description: Standard deviation of day-of-year values across valid spatial cells or pixels.

properties.title: Valid Pixel Percentage
properties.description: Percentage of valid spatial cells or pixels used to compute the phenology summary metric.

properties.title: Coordinate Reference System
properties.description: Coordinate reference system used by the spatial representation of the feature or coverage-derived summary.

properties.title: Grid Width (columns)
properties.description: Number of columns in the grid used for the coverage-derived phenology data.

properties.title: Grid Height (rows)
properties.description: Number of rows in the grid used for the coverage-derived phenology data.

properties.title: Source Sensor Platform
properties.description: Sensor or observation platform used as the source for the phenology derivation.

properties.title: Derivation Algorithm
properties.description: Algorithm or processing method used to derive the phenology metric.

properties.title: Trend Slope (days/year)
properties.description: Rate of change of the VAP start date over time, expressed in days per year.

properties.title: Annual Anomaly Status
properties.description: Annual anomaly category relative to a baseline, for example early, normal or late.
